description: BRIDLEWOODS – in the heart of Walnut Grove. This 1,567 sq. ft. two-storey townhome offers an ideal layout and a preferred end-unit location backing onto a private greenbelt. The main floor features a spacious living and dining area with a cozy gas fireplace, updated laminate flooring, a 2-piece bathroom, and convenient in-suite laundry. The bright kitchen and eating nook open directly to the rear patio and yard—perfect for summer BBQs and entertaining. Upstairs you’ll find 3 bedrooms, including a large primary suite, plus 2 full bathrooms. Parking includes a single garage and an additional spot right out front. Family and pet-friendly complex in a prime location close to schools, shopping, restaurants, and parks.
